message:
✨ GPU Reservations bypasses demo mode when in-cluster with OAuth (#1700)

When the console runs in-cluster and the user is authenticated via
OAuth, GPU Reservations now shows live data instead of demo data.
Other pages remain in demo mode as before. This ensures operators
on pok-prod-01 and vllm-d see real reservation data.

Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>
